role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, settlement patterns, and climate cues consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on vegetation types and biome characteristics as required.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure standards (poles, fences, road width) appropriate for the role.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (fencing style, roof materials) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Ukraine. The agents adhered to their roles, though the linguistic agent had no data to contribute. The meta agent provided the strongest differentiating evidence (fencing style), which the tournament judge correctly utilized to select Ukraine over Moldova.

landscape: claimed 'dark, fertile soil (chernozem)' visible — soil is not visible in the image

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Terrain and vegetation match; soil color is an inference.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Fences, poles, and road features accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Fencing and roof styles accurately described.
